system.name: UNKNOWN
system.description: The system is a layered, modular monolith application built with a Spring Boot backend and Angular frontend. It manages deed registration, document metadata, handover processes, key management, archiving, reporting, workflow orchestration and related capabilities.

architecture.evidence_summary: Primary style derived from architecture_styles (layered_architecture) and confirmed by the presence of a Spring Boot backend typical of layered Java applications. Secondary style identified as modular monolith from architecture_styles. Layer list taken from layer_structure metadata.

capabilities.name: Action
capabilities.description: Handles action processing, worker coordination and related API configuration.

capabilities.name: Archiving
capabilities.description: Manages archiving of deeds and related signing tokens.

capabilities.name: WaWi
capabilities.description: Handles WA‑WI (external system) integration for deeds.

capabilities.name: Correction
capabilities.description: Applies correction notes and processes business purpose data.

capabilities.name: DeedManagement
capabilities.description: Core deed handling – creation, logging, registry, type, WA‑WI orchestration.

capabilities.name: DocumentMetadata
capabilities.description: Management of document metadata and related work processing.

capabilities.name: Handover
capabilities.description: Handles hand‑over data sets for deed processing.

capabilities.name: SignatureFolder
capabilities.description: Manages signature folder creation and updates.

capabilities.name: Reporting
capabilities.description: Generation of reports and handling of report metadata.

capabilities.name: Job
capabilities.description: Background job execution and status handling.

capabilities.name: NumberManagement
capabilities.description: UVZ number allocation and gap/skip handling.

capabilities.name: OfficialActivity
capabilities.description: Metadata about official activities attached to deeds.

capabilities.name: Task
capabilities.description: Task execution within the workflow engine.

capabilities.name: ApplicationInitialization
capabilities.description: Bootstrap of application settings and import utilities.

maintainability.evidence: Low relation density (0.11) and no identified technical debt, but a single service (deed_entry_service_impl) has a large number of dependencies, which may affect maintainability.

scalability.evidence: Layered architecture with clear separation of concerns; however, the presence of a very large service could become a bottleneck under scale.

security.evidence: No security‑related markers (authentication, authorization, vulnerability) were found in the indexed facts.

testability.evidence: No test‑related markers (unit test, integration test, mock) were found in the indexed facts.

risks.name: God Service – deed_entry_service_impl
risks.mitigation: Refactor the service into smaller, cohesive services or introduce façade layers to reduce direct dependencies.

risks.name: Potential hidden technical debt
risks.mitigation: Run a full source index and enforce code‑review policies that require explicit debt tagging.

risks.name: Missing security evidence
risks.mitigation: Perform a dedicated security audit (static analysis, penetration testing) and ensure security annotations are present on controllers/services.

risks.name: Lack of test artifacts
risks.mitigation: Introduce unit and integration test suites, enforce coverage thresholds, and add test-specific annotations.

recommendations: Refactor deed_entry_service_impl into smaller domain‑specific services to reduce coupling.
Run a comprehensive code‑base indexing (Phase 0) to ensure all TODO/FIXME/HACK markers are captured.
Introduce security annotations (e.g., @PreAuthorize) on all REST controllers and perform a static security scan.
Add unit and integration tests for each service and controller; enforce a minimum coverage of 80%.
Review the list of high_dependency_components from the architecture metadata and consider extracting shared functionality into utility services or libraries.
validation_notes: Component count discrepancy: layer_structure reports total_components 461, while complexity assessment reports 298. Adopted 461 based on detailed breakdown.
No version information available for Spring Boot, Angular, or database components; versions set to UNKNOWN.
